sentences.english: I once called my teacher 'Mom' in front of the whole class.
sentences.korean: 한번 반 전체 앞에서 선생님을 '엄마'라고 불렀어요.

sentences.english: Everyone laughed and I turned bright red.
I tripped and fell in front of my crush at school.
I tried to play it cool but it was pretty obvious.
sentences.korean: 아무렇지 않은 척했지만 꽤 티가 났어요.

sentences.english: I accidentally sent a text about my boss to my boss.
sentences.korean: 실수로 상사에 대한 문자를 상사에게 보냈어요.

sentences.english: My heart dropped when I realized what I'd done.
sentences.korean: 뭘 했는지 깨달았을 때 심장이 철렁했어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
